evaluators.name: African Freshwater Comparison List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved the 3 highest-funded qualifying African freshwater biodiversity projects (2018–2022) into a comparison-type project list.

evaluators.name: South America Coastal Restoration Subscription Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user subscribed to updates for a 2024 coastal restoration project in South America, using the expected email address.

evaluators.name: Urban Air Quality Reading List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether there is an 'Urban Air Quality' reading list containing the top 5 most-cited qualifying PM2.5 urban air quality articles (2019–2023).

evaluators.name: Climate Adaptation Webinars Registration and Schedule Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user registered for and added to their schedule the two climate adaptation webinars in the first half of 2025, with the correct registrant details.

evaluators.name: Southeast Asia Deforestation Download Queue and ZIP Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user queued the 2 most recently updated qualifying Southeast Asia deforestation CSV datasets (CC-BY or CC0) and prepared a consistent ZIP download.

evaluators.name: Water Quality Volunteer Mailing List Contact Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user contacted the correct medium-risk water quality project with community engagement (second newest by start date) using the specified volunteer mailing list message.

evaluators.name: Microplastics PI Contact Note Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved PI contact information for an ongoing microplastics project (<= $500k funding, team size <= 10) into a 'Collaboration ideas' note with the expected body and matching PI fields.

evaluators.name: European Renewable Energy Briefing Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a briefing for the longer-duration project among the first two completed European renewable energy projects (by most recent end date), including objectives, methods, and key outcomes sections.
